title: The Quintell.
content:
Up with the quintell, that the rout,
    May fart for joy, as well as shout:
    Either's welcome, stink or civit,
    If we take it, as they give it.
meaning:
"The Quintell." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
